title: WmxSite
description: A Search Console site resource representing a verified property. Properties can be URL-prefix properties or domain properties.

siteUrl.description: The URL of the site. For URL-prefix properties, this is the full URL including protocol. For domain properties, this uses the sc-domain: prefix (e.g., sc-domain:example.com).

permissionLevel.description: The user's permission level for this site in Search Console.
